The '''Echani foil''' was a [[Sword/Legends|sword]] crafted to honor [[Raskta Fenni]], the greatest [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] duelist of her time. Many of these weapons were sold but the difficulties in the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]-resistant [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] weave allowed only a few to survive.

Around the year [[3956 BBY]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Grann (commander)|Grann]], a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] diplomat stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] owned an Echani Foil.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
